globs.title: Include URLs (globs)
globs.description: Glob patterns matching URLs of pages that will be included in crawling. Setting this option allows you to customize the crawling scope. For example `https://{store,docs}.example.com/**` lets the crawler access all URLs starting with `https://store.example.com/` or `https://docs.example.com/`.

excludes.title: Exclude URLs (globs)
excludes.description: Glob patterns matching URLs of pages that will be excluded from crawling. Note that this affects only links found on pages, but not Start URLs, which are always crawled.

pseudoUrls.title: Pseudo-URLs
pseudoUrls.description: Pseudo-URLs to match links in the page that you want to enqueue. Alternative to glob patterns. Combine with Link selector to tell the scraper where to find links.

linkSelector.title: Link Selector
linkSelector.description: CSS selector for links to enqueue. Leave empty to disable link enqueueing.

keepUrlFragments.title: Keep URL fragments
keepUrlFragments.description: URL fragments (the parts of URL after a #) are not considered when the scraper determines whether a URL has already been visited. Turn this on to treat URLs with different fragments as different pages.

respectRobotsTxtFile.title: Respect robots.txt
respectRobotsTxtFile.description: If enabled, the crawler will consult the robots.txt file for each domain before crawling pages.

initialCookies.title: Initial cookies
initialCookies.description: Cookies pre-set on every page the scraper opens. JSON array of objects with `name` and `value` properties.

customHttpHeaders.title: Custom HTTP headers
customHttpHeaders.description: HTTP headers added to all crawler requests. JSON object with header names as keys.

maxPagesPerCrawl.title: Max pages
maxPagesPerCrawl.description: Maximum pages to crawl. 0 means unlimited.

maxResultsPerCrawl.title: Max results
maxResultsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of results saved to dataset. 0 means unlimited.

maxCrawlingDepth.title: Max crawling depth
maxCrawlingDepth.description: Maximum link depth from Start URLs. 0 means unlimited.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of browser pages running in parallel.

maxRequestRetries.title: Max request retries
maxRequestRetries.description: Maximum number of retries for failed requests.

trafilaturaConfig.title: Trafilatura options
trafilaturaConfig.description: rs-trafilatura extraction settings. Leave empty for balanced defaults. Keys: fast, favorPrecision, favorRecall, includeComments, includeTables, includeImages, includeFormatting, includeLinks, deduplicate, targetLanguage, withMetadata, onlyWithMetadata, urlBlacklist, authorBlacklist.

saveRawHtmlToKeyValueStore.title: Save raw HTML to key-value store
saveRawHtmlToKeyValueStore.description: If enabled, save the raw HTML of all pages to the default key-value store and include the URL in the dataset output.

saveExtractedTextToKeyValueStore.title: Save extracted text to key-value store
saveExtractedTextToKeyValueStore.description: If enabled, extract plain text from all pages, save it to the key-value store, and include the URL in the dataset output.

saveExtractedJsonToKeyValueStore.title: Save extracted JSON to key-value store
saveExtractedJsonToKeyValueStore.description: If enabled, extract JSON with metadata from all pages, save it to the key-value store, and include the URL in the dataset output.

saveExtractedMarkdownToKeyValueStore.title: Save extracted Markdown to key-value store
saveExtractedMarkdownToKeyValueStore.description: If enabled, extract Markdown from all pages, save it to the key-value store, and include the URL in the dataset output.

datasetName.title: Dataset name
datasetName.description: Name or ID of the dataset for storing results. Leave empty to use the default run dataset.

keyValueStoreName.title: Key-value store name
keyValueStoreName.description: Name or ID of the key-value store for content files. Leave empty to use the default store.

requestQueueName.title: Request queue name
requestQueueName.description: Name of the request queue for pending URLs. Leave empty to use the default queue.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Enables loading websites from IP addresses in specific geographies and to circumvent blocking.

pageLoadTimeoutSecs.title: Page load timeout
pageLoadTimeoutSecs.description: Maximum time to wait for page load in seconds

ignoreCorsAndCsp.title: Ignore CORS and CSP
ignoreCorsAndCsp.description: Ignore Content Security Policy and Cross-Origin Resource Sharing restrictions.

maxScrollHeightPixels.title: Max scroll height
maxScrollHeightPixels.description: Maximum pixels to scroll down the page until all content is loaded. 0 disables scrolling.

userAgent.title: User-Agent
userAgent.description: Custom User-Agent string. Leave empty to use the default browser User-Agent.

debugLog.title: Debug log
debugLog.description: Include debug messages in the log output.

browserLog.title: Browser log
browserLog.description: Include browser console messages in the log.
